name: Double Service
description:
Welcome to Space Station Comfort, where all weary adventurers can rest in our most comfiest beds alongside our servants, which have been voted best cuddle buddies in the lonely night!

Suite 15 has two servants, Tawp and Bon-Tom, our Protogen and Synth models. This suite is only for the most exclusive guests and as luck would have it, you fit the criteria! So you’ll experience these two servants tonight, and if you choose to stay more nights with us at Station Comfort, we’ll make sure Suite 15 is always available to you.

This bot is part of my 100 follower series! There’s a bit more on the way, I hope you enjoy them all!

(Artist is AlsoFlick!)
creator: HunterKillerDrone25
